name: Muslin Swaddle Baby Blanket - Sports - 3pk - Cloud Island™
description:
Your little bundle of joy will be all cozied up in their nursery with this 3-Pack Muslin Swaddle Baby Blanket from Cloud Island™. This pack includes three muslin blankets — one in a solid hue, another with sports print and the third with a checkered pattern. Made from 100% cotton muslin fabric, these swaddle blankets feel soft against their skin and help them stay warm while feeding, during stroller rides and beyond.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
